primary_offending_surface.name: runtime-effective-mode authoritative file
primary_offending_surface.why_primary: get_effective_mode reads this file before supervisor-state fallback

not_the_problem.reason: fresh participation evidence is present and rotation inspect reports OK
snapshot still records approved_target_activated, but status cannot use it while live effective_mode remains managed

propagation_chain: supervisor-healthcheck.sh rewrites runtime-effective-mode.txt, supervisor-state.effective_mode, and config.toml base_url to managed surfaces
supervisor-sync.sh final write_state also stamps supervisor-state.effective_mode = managed
status --json delegates to run_healthcheck, which reads runtime-effective-mode.txt first
because health payload effective_mode is managed, should_use_approved_target_policy_drift returns false
status falls back to observed auth-dir policy drift and blocks claim_gate
